title: Reverse Substrings Between Each Pair of Parentheses
titleCn: 反转每对括号间的子串

testcases.input: s = "(u(love)i)" Output: "iloveu" Explanation: The substring "love" is reversed first, then the whole string is reversed.
testcases.expectedOutput: "iloveu" Explanation: The substring "love" is reversed first, then the whole string is reversed.

testcases.input: s = "(ed(et(oc))el)" Output: "leetcode" Explanation: First, we reverse the substring "oc", then "etco", and finally, the whole string.
testcases.expectedOutput: "leetcode" Explanation: First, we reverse the substring "oc", then "etco", and finally, the whole string.
